plan_review_notes: Approved to proceed with latest-local-baseline alignment plus bounded Phase 1 target materialization inside isolated Sisyphus evaluation worktrees. Scope excludes MCP surface and promotion/PR automation.

plan_review_history.notes: Approved to proceed with latest-local-baseline alignment plus bounded Phase 1 target materialization inside isolated Sisyphus evaluation worktrees. Scope excludes MCP surface and promotion/PR automation.

spec_review_notes: Spec frozen for the candidate materialization slice: baseline snapshots, candidate-only text/policy rewrites, evaluation evidence plumbing, and focused regression coverage.

normal_cases.name: A baseline evaluation task captures task-local source snapshots and emits materialization evidence without mutating the evaluation worktree sources.
A candidate evaluation task applies bounded Phase 1 text/policy rewrites in its isolated worktree and exposes the manifest and touched files through evaluation evidence.

edge_cases.name: Multiple selected targets preserve registry order while materializing only the requested source files.
Materialization artifacts stay task-local and do not leak writes back into the source repository root.

exception_cases.name: Missing rewrite anchors or an unavailable evaluation worktree fail the evaluation with actionable evidence instead of silently continuing.

verification_methods.target: A baseline evaluation task captures task-local source snapshots and emits materialization evidence without mutating the evaluation worktree sources.
A candidate evaluation task applies bounded Phase 1 text/policy rewrites in its isolated worktree and exposes the manifest and touched files through evaluation evidence.
